meta.name: Generate Upwork proposals with GPT-4o-mini, Airtable and Slack

name: Automate proposals on Upwork with AI, Airtable and Slack

parameters.content:
## How it works

This workflow monitors Upwork job listings every minute via a Vollna RSS feed. Each new job is parsed to extract the title, description, budget, skills, and a clean Upwork URL. Jobs are scored against your skill list — only those matching 2 or more of your skills pass through. Low-rated clients are filtered out. Each job is checked against Airtable to avoid processing duplicates.

For every new qualifying job, GPT-4o-mini writes a personalised 150–250 word proposal referencing details from the actual job post. The proposal and all job data are saved to Airtable with a status of "New". A Slack message is sent instantly with the job details, matched skills, and the full proposal ready to copy and submit.

## Setup steps

1. **Vollna** — Sign up at vollna.com, create a job filter for your skills, and copy the RSS feed URL into the RSS trigger node
2. **OpenAI** — Add your API key as an n8n credential and connect it to the AI node
3. **Airtable** — Create a base using the schema in the README, then add your Base ID and Table ID to both Airtable nodes
4. **Slack** — Create a Slack app with `chat:write` scope, invite it to your channel, and connect it in the Slack node
5. **Customise** — Update YOUR_SKILLS in the Filter node and update MY PROFILE in the Build OpenAI Payload node with your actual experience

📡 **Ingest & Parse**
Polls Vollna RSS every minute. Extracts job title, description, budget, skills, and clean Upwork URL from each item.

🎯 **Filter & Deduplicate**
Needs 2+ skill matches. Skips low-rated clients and already-processed jobs.

🤖 **Generate, Save & Notify**
GPT-4o-mini writes a tailored proposal. Saves to Airtable, sends to Slack.
